symptoms: Product dripping from the spout between serves.
Puddle forms on the drip tray within minutes.

tests.inspect-beater: Dispense valve piston seal is torn — valve not seating fully between portions.
tests.temp-probe: Barrel and hopper temps both in spec.

flavour: Sealed the slow financial drain in the drip tray.
authenticityNote: Dispense valve piston seals wear with use and begin to weep between portions. Visually similar to a door O-ring leak but originating higher up inside the valve body — inspect-beater confirms it.
